text:
"In My Spirit" is a song from the film Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance. It is track 12 in the album Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance Original Soundtrack, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/19800 

In the film, the song is featured during the Tenth Angel's assault on Tokyo-3. 

Lyrics

 
In my spirit lies my faith
Stronger than love, and with me it will be for always
